name: Mustard, Quick and Easy Dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine one 8-oz jar of Dijon mustard with 1 tablespoon fresh chopped dill or 1 teaspoon dried dill weed.
2. Add 3 tablespoons of olive oil to the mixture.
3. Serve with pate or fish, or use as a sandwich spread.
4. Also good added to a salad dressing.
Note: Homemade mustards must be stored in the refrigerator.
